title: TNF-α Pathway: Clinical Trial & Pipeline Intelligence — Q1 2026
indications_covered: Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction
executive_summary_preview: The first ten weeks of 2026 have delivered a notably active period for TNF-alpha-related clinical development, spanning neurology, rheumatology, gastroenterology, and critical care. Three broad themes dominate the landscape: an accelerating maturation of selective and next-generation TNF inhibitors, led by XPro1595's FDA-aligned Phase 2b/3 registration pathway in Alzheimer's disease; continued validation of established anti-TNF biologics in new or underserved indications; and a growing body of evidence for non-biologic agents modulating TNF-alpha signaling as adjunctive or repurposed therapies.
